title: Add SSN persistence call and NVM error handling to oscore_protect_request
description: After atomic SSN increment in oscore_protect_request, call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn() on success path. On NVM failure (OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED), either rollback SSN or advance to safe value to prevent nonce reuse. Update error paths (cleanup_protect_request) accordingly. Reference: oscore.c:1418-1444 and persist_ssn.
